search.title: Search
search.desc: Searching in arrays: linear search (unordered array) vs binary search (ordered array).

dfs.title: Depth-first search (DFS)
dfs.desc: Comparing depth-first search using edge list and adjacency matrix graph representation.

dfs_topo.title: Topological order (using DFS)
dfs_topo.desc: Algorithm for finding one possible topological ordering and shortest and longest paths.

bfs.title: Breadth-first search (BFS)
bfs.desc: Comparing breadth-first search using edge list and adjacency matrix graph representation.

dijkstra.title: Dijkstra's algorithm
dijkstra.desc: Single-source shortest paths in directed graphs with non-negative edge weights.

bf.title: Bellman-Ford algorithm
bf.desc: Single-source shortest paths in directed graphs, allowing negative edge weights but no negative cycles.

mindist.title: Shortest path algorithms comparison
mindist.desc: Single-source shortest paths in a directed graph with positive edge weights: comparing Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford and DFS+topological sort.
